ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft assigned to the flight */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Departure airport code */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Arrival airport code */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, departed, landed, delayed) */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., domestic, international, charter) */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of cargo on the flight (in kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., Boeing 737, Airbus A320) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the aircraft */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats on the aircraft */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the aircraft (in km/h) */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the aircraft (in km) */,
  "max_altitude" INTEGER /* Maximum altitude of the aircraft (in ft) */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft (in liters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight plan */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the plan is for */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the flight (e.g., JFK-LAX) */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Cruise altitude of the flight */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Cruise speed of the flight */,
  "estimated_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Estimated fuel consumption for the flight (in liters) */,
  "estimated_flight_time" TEXT /* Estimated flight time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_route FOREIGN KEY ("route") REFERENCES routes ("route_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route (e.g., JFK-LAX) */,
  "waypoints" TEXT /* Waypoints along the route (e.g., NYC, CHI, DEN) */,
  "route_length" INTEGER /* Length of the route (in km) */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., standard, alternate, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waypoints" (
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waypoint */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the waypoint is on */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the waypoint (e.g., NYC, CHI, DEN) */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the waypoint */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the waypoint */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the waypoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waypoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waypoints_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixes" (
  "fix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fix */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the fix (e.g., NYC, CHI, DEN) */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the fix */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the fix */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the fix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legs" (
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leg */,
  "fix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fix the leg is from */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the leg */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing of the leg (in degrees) */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., standard, alternate, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legs_fix_id FOREIGN KEY ("fix_id") REFERENCES fixes ("fix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_legs" (
  "flight_leg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight leg */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the leg is part of */,
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leg */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the leg */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the leg */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption for the leg (in liters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_leg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_legs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_legs_leg_id FOREIGN KEY ("leg_id") REFERENCES legs ("leg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the weather condition is for */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (in Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (in %) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in km/h) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction (in degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_control" (
  "atc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air traffic control data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the air traffic control data is for */,
  "route_clearance" TEXT /* Route clearance */,
  "altitude_clearance" INTEGER /* Altitude clearance */,
  "speed_clearance" INTEGER /* Speed clearance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_control_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight performance metric */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the performance metric is for */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency (in km/L) */,
  "carbon_emissions" REAL /* Carbon emissions (in kg) */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Flight time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_performance_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, dispatcher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view flight plan) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Date and time of notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
